labels.defaultAbstract: This publication investigates state reform action plans and DIPP compliance index outcomes.
labels.downloadExcel: Download full list of research papers related to Doing Business topics (Excel)

messages.intro1: Each year <1>Ease of Doing Business</1> highlights important new work that speaks to a variety of issues impacting the private sector. Brief summaries of this work — including policy briefs, regulatory impact assessments, and academic papers — are available by <3>Ease of Doing Business</3> topic and related policy spaces. If you would like to recommend any additional papers that are not already listed on the website please email your suggestions to the team.
messages.intro2: Blogs and publications from our research team are also provided periodically to reflect ground-level MSME reform progress across Indian states.
messages.intro3: Make a selection below to see the papers published by category or filtered by regional state focus.
messages.italicNote: Ease of Doing Business considers the following list of publications as relevant for research on regulations affecting private sector growth. If you find any missing publications, please let us know.
messages.selectTopicHeader: Select a Topic or Regional Profile
messages.selectTopicSub: Choose a research category or state focus to explore reports, briefings, and publications.
messages.noPapers: No research papers found matching this selection.
